spec_match.rationale: The inspector now names and reads border-width, outline-width, column-rule-width, computedStyleMap(), and getComputedStyle() with the correct border exception.

interactive.rationale: Property, width, style, and color controls update the preview, CSS sample, Typed OM readout, resolved readout, and comparison matrix.

blurb_alignment.rationale: The feature index now describes the same computed-value inspection that the page demonstrates.

edge_cases.rationale: The none branch shows border computedStyleMap() retaining the authored width while getComputedStyle().borderTopWidth reports 0px, plus outline and column-rule retained values.

references.rationale: The page cites the ChromeStatus feature link for 5133099851317248.

design_system.rationale: The repaired UI uses CSS variables and keeps button background and color overrides paired.

summary: Open critique items repaired for this concept. DevTools MCP verification exercised the property pair, authored width, style, and color controls at http://localhost:3000/v147/css-update-decoupling-of-width-and-style-properties/computed-value-inspector/; border 8px/none showed Typed OM 8px and getComputedStyle() 0px, outline 8px/none and column-rule 8px/none retained 8px through getComputedStyle(), and the ChromeStatus link was correct. Console and network were clean, and the feature conformance route passed 7 of 7 assertions in Chrome 148.
